title: Fix Fargate pod scheduling failure
scenario: 🔥 Pods in the `reporting` namespace are stuck in `Pending` on EKS Fargate. The Fargate profile selector matches namespace `reports` (typo) and has no label selector. Fix the Fargate profile ConfigMap so it matches pods in the `reporting` namespace with label `team: data`.
starterYaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: fargate-profile-config
  namespace: default
data:
  profile.json: |
    {
      "fargateProfileName": "reporting-profile",
      "clusterName": "prod-cluster",
      "podExecutionRoleArn": "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/AmazonEKSFargatePodExecutionRole",
      "selectors": [
        {
          "namespace": "reports"
        }
      ]
    }

hints.text: Fargate profiles use selectors to decide which pods run on Fargate. A pod must match the selector namespace AND all selector labels. Check the namespace in the selector — it says `reports`, but the pods are in `reporting`.
Fix the namespace from `reports` to `reporting`, then add a `labels` map to the selector: `"labels": { "team": "data" }`.
